questionHtml:
Three of the fundamental forces between particles are

          I.     strong nuclear

          II.     weak nuclear

          III.     electromagnetic.

What forces are experienced by an electron?

A.     I and II only

B.     I and III only

C.     II and III only

D.     I, II and III
